All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Baker
Represents a baker in the pizzeria who takes orders from the order queue, cooks them, and places them in the storage for delivery.
BakerDto
Data Transfer Object representing a baker in the pizzeria.
BlockingQueue<T>
A thread-safe buffer interface for storing and retrieving items.
BoundedBlockingQueue<T>
A thread-safe bounded blocking queue implementation of the Buffer interface.
ConfigLoader
A class responsible for loading the configuration of the pizzeria simulator from a JSON file.
ConsoleLogger
An implementation of the OrderLogger interface that logs messages to the console.
Courier
Represents a courier in the pizzeria who takes cooked orders from the storage and delivers them.
CourierDto
Data Transfer Object representing a courier in the pizzeria.
Order
Represents a pizza order with a unique identifier.
OrderGenerator
Implements orders generation.
OrderLogger
An interface for logging messages related to pizza orders.
PizzeriaSimulator
Implements simulation logic for the pizzeria.
PizzeriaSimulatorDto
Data Transfer Object representing the configuration of the pizzeria simulator.
PizzeriaSimulatorFactory
Factory class for creating instances of PizzeriaSimulator based on the provided configuration.
PizzeriaWorker
An abstract class representing a worker in the pizzeria.
